name: The Golf Nut Performance Center and Pro Shop
about: The Golf Nut Performance Center is a golf-focused venue in Fort Smith, AR, offering a combination of retail, simulation, and instruction services. It is a locally-owned and operated establishment that has served the community for nearly 30 years, featuring a pro shop with over 30 national brands, a Trackman simulator for club fitting and lessons, and a Foresight FSX Play simulator for indoor virtual play. The venue provides a climate-controlled environment for practice, club selection, and game improvement, with all services offered from a single location.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to a public Trackman simulator, the same technology used on the PGA Tour
One of the only public Trackman simulators in the state of Arkansas
A wide selection of major brand clubs, apparel, and accessories in the pro shop
Climate-controlled indoor play for year-round comfort and practice

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of on-site food or beverage service.
No mention of on-site alcohol service or BYOB policy.

simulator_hardware.notes: Used for club fitting and lessons. The only public Trackman simulator in the state.
Used for indoor virtual play and practice with over 60 courses available.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, for lessons and play, you bring your own clubs. The facility will clean them at no cost.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No information is provided about bringing outside food or drinks.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time for an 18-hole round is not specified, as the simulator is available by the hour.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No, the facility's use of golf shoes and focus on technical equipment suggests an environment more suited to adults.
